Hi, I am Arjun Patel. Please remember that I lead the platform team at NovaRetail.
Our production stack is FastAPI, Postgres, Redis, and Qdrant.
The current API p95 latency is 420 milliseconds and our target is below 250 milliseconds.
My timezone is Asia/Kolkata and I usually do release reviews at 6:30 PM IST.
The next release freeze is on 2026-04-15.
Please note that service alpha depends on service beta for inventory sync.
We have three active environments: dev, staging, and prod.
Staging deploys every Tuesday and Friday at 11:00 AM IST.
Production deploys happen every Wednesday at 8:00 PM IST.
The incident commander for this quarter is Meera Joshi.
